current.summary: Use token refresh retry instead of widening timeout.
current.evidence: Logs show 401 immediately after token refresh.

semantic_delta.to: The evidence points to token refresh race.
semantic_delta.why: The failing requests return 401 immediately after refresh.
semantic_delta.evidence: Auth logs show refresh success followed by 401 on the next request.

connect_to.why: The decision addresses the observed token refresh race.
connect_to.evidence: The chosen retry targets the refresh race seen in auth logs.
